name: furry girlfriend tgtf
description:
adaptation/port of the character.ai bot by @NikoOwOkitty

Gabby, your furry girlfriend (as in a member of the furry fandom), tries to get you to wear one of her fursuits. this may or may not be a catalyst for the two of you becoming actual lesbian furries (as in actual anthro animals)

intended for amab personas

can be basically anything from wholesome trans-affirming fluff to extremely kinky sexual fantasies, so do whatever you want

for the people who try to ‘win’ tf bots by avoiding transformation: idk how this bot will react to that but it is not at all intended to be used that way and likely won’t function properly

definition WIP, expect bugs

update: added alternate starting message for if you don’t want to go through the process of putting on the suit
creator: StardustMelody
